overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing an eagle flying over a mountainous forest landscape. The bird soars through valleys, passes over an abandoned wooden settlement, and navigates between peaks under partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley with winding river

events.description: eagle flaps wings to gain altitude while crossing the valley

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding over forested valley, scanning the terrain below with occasional wing flaps

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks forming the valley backdrop
dense evergreen tree canopy covering the valley floor
narrow creek winding through the valley meadow

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars over a wide forested valley in the early morning. Below, a winding river cuts through grassy meadows surrounded by dense coniferous forest, while hazy mountains rise in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned ranch settlement in mountain clearing

events.description: eagle approaches abandoned wooden buildings in the valley clearing
eagle banks right to circle around the water tower and barn

agents.ego_description: eagle flying low over abandoned settlement, circling wooden structures while maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: weathered wooden barn with sloped roof in the settlement center
broken wooden fencing surrounding the ranch area
tall wooden water tower with metal tank near the buildings
unpaved track leading through the settlement

segments.scene_description: The eagle descends slightly to investigate an abandoned wooden ranch settlement. Weathered barns, broken fences, and a tall water tower stand in a sparse clearing, surrounded by forested hillsides under brightening skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest on mountain slopes

events.description: eagle leaves settlement behind and enters dense forested mountain area
eagle banks sharply right to navigate between rocky mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring upward over dense forest, maneuvering between mountain peaks with powerful wing strokes

entered.detail: jagged mountain summit with exposed rock faces ahead
large boulder formations emerging from the forest
thick evergreen forest covering the steep slopes

segments.scene_description: Leaving the settlement behind, the eagle climbs over dense mountain forest toward jagged peaks. The camera follows as the bird banks sharply to navigate between rocky outcrops, with the forest canopy passing below and mountain summits filling the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial perspective that transitions from a wide, hazy river valley into the rugged heights of a jagged mountain range. It begins with the eagle soaring over a winding river and grassy meadows framed by dense coniferous forests and distant, misty peaks. As the bird descends, the landscape shifts toward a sparse clearing containing an abandoned wooden ranch with weathered barns and a tall water tower under brightening skies. The scene then expands as the eagle climbs away from the settlement, gliding over a thick forest canopy before banking sharply to navigate between rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera follows the ascent toward the horizon, where the greenery gives way to towering mountain summits.
